movement.name: Swift
movement.description: Increased movement speed by half Tier (round up)

movement.name: Skirmisher
movement.description: Immune to opportunity attacks, +1 space attack reach

movement.name: Behemoth
movement.description: Cannot be Grabbed, Moved, knocked Prone, or Stunned

movement.name: Bulwark
movement.description: Enemies starting adjacent have half movement speed

movement.name: Mole
movement.description: Move through earth and stone at full/half speed

movement.name: Flight
movement.description: Move in any direction, ignore obstacles

movement.name: Teleportation
movement.description: Instant movement to visible locations, -2 Sp penalty

movement.name: Portal
movement.description: Create linked portals for team movement

movement.name: Super Jump
movement.description: Jump distance equals full movement, +1-2 Sp bonus

attackType.name: AOE Specialist
attackType.description: Free AOE attack type, crowd control focus

attackType.name: Direct Specialist
attackType.description: Free Direct attack type, reliable delivery

attackType.name: Single Target
attackType.description: Free Melee and Ranged attack types

effectType.name: Damage Specialist
effectType.description: Maximum damage potential, Basic Conditions separate

effectType.name: Hybrid Specialist
effectType.description: All attacks combine damage and conditions

uniqueAbility.name: Versatile Master
uniqueAbility.description: 2 Quick Actions per turn, extra at Tier 8

uniqueAbility.name: Cut Above
uniqueAbility.description: +1-3 to all core stats based on Tier

defensive.name: Stalwart
defensive.description: -Tier Avoidance, half damage from chosen type

specialAttack.name: Normal
specialAttack.description: 3 Specialty Upgrades at half cost, flexible limits

specialAttack.name: Specialist
specialAttack.description: 3 specific Limits, higher returns, focused style

specialAttack.name: One Trick
specialAttack.description: Single attack with Tier×20 points, no Limits

utility.name: Specialized
utility.description: Double Tier bonus for one stat, no additional Expertise

utility.name: Jack of All Trades
utility.description: Tier bonus to ALL checks, no specialized Expertise
